title: Under Pressure
why_this_song: Under Pressure by Queen (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Can't we give ourselves one more chance"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Puts people on streets"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Pressure pushing down on me"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Puts people on streets"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Under pressure that brings a building down"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "give" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "give" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "people" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "people" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Under Pressure" was released in 1981. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Under Pressure" foi lançada em 1981. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
